catalogSchemaVersion.description: The catalog schemaVersion this mapping was derived from.

deploymentStatus.description: Lifecycle state of this execution mapping within the WBB Service. 'draft': derived from the catalog but not yet reviewed. 'validated': reviewed and ready to be registered as a ProcessDefinition in the WBB Service. 'deployed': actively registered and executable in the WBB Service (processId is set). 'deprecated': superseded by a newer mapping version; no new instances may be started.

processId.description: The GovStack ProcessDefinition identifier assigned by the WBB Service when this mapping is deployed. Null until deploymentStatus reaches 'deployed'. This value is set by the WBB Service, not by the catalog or normalization pipeline.

trigger.description: Defines how this workflow process is initiated. Aligns with GovStack WBB required execution methods: API-based, manual, and time-based. If absent, defaults to api trigger.

type.description: Initiation method. 'api': triggered by a POST to /processes/{processId}/start (e.g. case submission from portal). 'cron': triggered on a time schedule (e.g. batch processing, reminder notifications). 'event': triggered by a prior process outcome (flow-trigger based on success or failure of another process).

cronExpression.description: Cron expression defining the schedule. Required when type is 'cron' (e.g. '0 8 * * 1-5' for weekdays at 08:00). Standard 5-field cron syntax.

eventType.description: Event type that triggers this process. Required when type is 'event' (e.g. 'case.decided', 'process.completed'). Aligns with GovStack flow-trigger concept.

eventSourceProcessId.description: serviceId of the source process whose outcome triggers this one. Used when type is 'event' and the trigger originates from another procedure's completion.

stepId.description: Must match a stepId in the catalog workflow.

action.description: Execution action type. See 5-workflow-execution-mapping.md §5.4 for semantics.

connector.description: Identifier of the WBB Service action handler or integration to invoke (e.g. 'http', 'email', 'form', 'approval'). The WBB Service maps this to an engine-specific action internally. Required when action is 'custom'.

inputMapping.description: Key-value map from case context variables to connector input parameters.

outputMapping.description: Key-value map from connector output to case context variables.

timeout.description: Maximum execution time in seconds before the step is escalated.

humanTask.description: Defines a human review task for steps requiring manual intervention.

assigneeRole.description: Role or group responsible for completing this task.

dueDays.description: Number of working days before the task is considered overdue.

instructions.description: Free-text instructions displayed to the assignee.

onFailure.description: Action to take on unrecoverable step failure. escalate: route to manual_intervention. reject: move case to rejected state. suspend: pause case pending external resolution.

notes.description: Implementation notes for this step mapping. Not exposed at runtime.
